response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned staff-level generalist with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, strong TypeScript, cloud exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and — most relevantly — current hands-on work building MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure at re:cinq. However, his AI-specific experience spans roughly one year, far short of the required 8+ years shipping production AI solutions, and the resume shows no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, LLM optimization, or Python. He reads as a strong engineer early in a GenAI pivot rather than a staff GenAI forward-deployed engineer, so an interview is only warranted if the pipeline is thin or the team values his MCP depth.
strengths: Current, directly relevant work on MCP servers and agentic-workflow frameworks — a listed key technology
18+ years of full-stack engineering with strong TypeScript/Node.js and cloud deployment experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, courses, conference talks) plus consulting background
concerns: Only ~1 year of AI/GenAI work versus the required 8+ years building production AI solutions
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or observability for AI systems
Python — a primary language for the role — is absent from his skills and work history

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG, vector DB, and Python evidence
